top_signals.title: US Seeks to Revive Iran Talks Amid Conditional Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: The US said Israel and Lebanon agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops fighting, contingent on “a complete cessation” of fire by Hezbollah and evacuation of operatives from Lebanese territory south of the Litani River. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth over $866 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Xi’s last frontier: China’s plan to transform its west - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Xi’s last frontier: China’s plan to transform its west  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SoftBank's shares are down 10% amid broader tech sell-off
top_signals.summary: Shares of SoftBank fell 10% following an overnight sell-off in the U.S. market on the back of wider profit taking in the tech sector.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid hits record share of global perps market as HIP-3 tops $62 billion monthly volume
top_signals.summary: Despite the bullish sentiment on HIP-3, Hyperliquid's pure crypto volumes are down significantly year over year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Transatlantic Crucible
top_signals.summary: The crisis between Washington and Europe may be a blessing in disguise.

top_signals.title: EdgeX offers refunds and launches 200,000 USDC bounty after 71% token flash crash
top_signals.summary: EdgeX says that 174 addresses flooded a PancakeSwap pool with EDGE token sell orders during a period of low liquidity.
